mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (member_id, total_amount, status, shipping_address) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{shippingAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, total_amount, status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT id, member_id, total_amount, status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'PENDING'
